title: Announcement on Importer Information Form update
bodyHtml:
The following announcement titled "Update on Importer Information Form" has been made by ITKIB.

As known, in accordance with the provisions of the relevant Communiqués on Application of Surveillance on Imports, presentation of the importer information form, approved by a sworn-in certified public accountant, to the registration center is required for the issuance of a registration certificate.

Therefore, the said forms must be submitted electronically to the registration center in compliance with the format specified in the Communiqués (with 2022 data added and approved by a certified public accountant) by May 31, 2023.

Those who do not submit the sworn-in certified public accountant-approved importer information form by June 1, 2023, will not have their registration certificate applications evaluated by the system as of the aforementioned date.

Note: Importer firms that submit the sworn-in certified public accountant-approved importer information form after June 1, 2023 will be able to have their registration certificate issued starting from the date of submission of the document.

The template for  2023 Importer Information Form is attached.

http://portal.ugm.com.tr/shared/dosyaal.ashx?arsivid=81d0fba3-5d52-46f8-84a0-5908449c2618&refno=REF2023_362.rar
